name: Morliver Peak
description: Local-name viewpoint at 4,569 ft on Gaia GPS and Google Maps; not in GNIS/OSM/UGRC. Henry Mountains area, ~70 mi west of Moab.
_notes: Coords from Gaia GPS as reported by user 2026-05-04. Outside the 50mi Moab radius; require --no-enforce-radius to ingest, or expand the pilot radius.
